title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 5–8, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hee Hee! That sounds like such a thrill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We definitely gotta go there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could you at least try to think of the danger!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But with this it looks like my own goal,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is inextricably tied with grand line,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Considering that "that man" is there as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...bunch of idiots. You lot are the type to rush to their deaths.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: True, but I'd rather have you leave out the "idiot" part...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ever since I've decided to become the world's greatest swordsman, I threw away my attachment to life.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The only one who has the right to call me an idiot is me alone.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ooh! Me too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As a real man, the same goes for me too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: LIAR.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...psh,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a load of crap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, retards! Haven't you realized the situation we're in right now!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The gigantic Galleon that's parked right in front of our restaurant,

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: belongs to the pirate fleet Admiral Don KrieG!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ship of the strongest pirate in all of East Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You got that!? So you can continue your little conversation after we've gotten ourselves out of this mess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Woohoo!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
